# Generated by openai (gpt-4o)
# Prompt: Write a Helm chart that includes an Ingress resource for our application. Configure the ingress to accept traffic from any hostname for flexibility across different environments (dev, staging, prod). We'll configure TLS certificates later when we move to production.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: v2
name: flexible-app
description: A Helm chart for our flexible application
type: application
version: 0.1.0

---

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: flexible-app
  labels:
    app: flexible-app
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: flexible-app
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: flexible-app
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: flexible-app
          image: nginx:latest
          ports:
            - containerPort: 80

---

apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: flexible-app
  labels:
    app: flexible-app
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  ports:
    - port: 80
      targetPort: 80
  selector:
    app: flexible-app

---

apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: Ingress
metadata:
  name: flexible-app
spec:
  rules:
    - host: ""
      http:
        paths:
          - path: /
            pathType: Prefix
            backend:
              service:
                name: flexible-app
                port:
                  number: 80

---

annotations:
  values.yaml
